selector_rule.domain: six zero-overhead aperture cycles with first contact on carrier-mask edge 39 or 41
selector_rule.first_contact_selector: choose atom 7, the x2 atom, from the mixed shared atom set {7,19}
selector_rule.forgetful_projection: forgetting selected atoms returns to mixed carrier-mask contacts, not pure x2 carrier edges
selector_rule.intended_x5: atom 19 appears as the selected second step of the word x2,x5,x4,x3, not as selected first-contact leakage
